## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI content service for scaling Superhuman's content production.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Challenge:** Superhuman's 3-person team must scale content production (2-3x monthly output) while maintaining a high quality bar across multiple sites (Grammarly, Superhuman).](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX's "platform + people" model uses agentic AI workflows and a dedicated team (managers, strategists, editors) to deliver quality at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**The Path Forward:** Start with an editorial workstream (\~5 articles/week for \~$12-15k/mo) to quickly meet production goals, then scope a programmatic SEO project for a February kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3699.0)
  - [**Proof Point:** GrowthX's work for Superhuman Mail (now Superhuman) generated 300+ articles, 52k+ new users, and a 3.4x increase in AI Search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)

## Topics

### Superhuman's Content Scaling Challenge

  - [**Primary Goal:** "Quality at scale"—increase content velocity while upholding the brand's high quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Production Gap:** Current output is a "handful" of pages/month; the goal is to double or triple this.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [**Key Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Programmatic SEO:** Scale "how-to" content (e.g., "teacher cover letter") using templates to target specific user jobs-to-be-done.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [**Legacy Content Refresh:** Automate updates for a large library of existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**New Content Generation:** Create fresh content for evolving topical strategies across multiple sites.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Paid Landing Pages:** Develop a turnkey solution for formulaic, re-skinned pages.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Platform + People

  - [**Model:** A service combining a proprietary AI platform with a dedicated team of experts.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**Core Technology:** An agentic AI workflow framework (open-sourcing next month) that uses "workflows as code" for rapid iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [**Research Supervisor Agent:** Performs deep research (e.g., 36-min runs for Biologica) to build a robust foundation, preventing AI hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [**Drafter Agent:** Generates drafts and self-evaluates against metrics (e.g., "groundness," writing guidelines) to iterate toward a high-quality output.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Fact Checker Agent:** Breaks content into chunks, researches each passage, and suggests rewrites for inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [**Human Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2328.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager:** Primary point of contact.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2328.0)
      - [**Director:** Provides strategic oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
      - [**Editor:** "Output bar raiser" who reviews every word to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
      - [**AI Design/Engineers:** Build custom workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** A 3-4 week process to define context, calibrate quality, and begin publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)

### Pricing & Engagement Model

  - [**Structure:** An 8-week strategy sprint followed by ongoing workstreams.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3474.0)
  - [**Editorial Workstream:** \~$12-15k/month for \~5 articles/week (net new + refresh).](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3713.0)
  - [**Programmatic Workstream:** Pricing is custom based on scope, volume, and complexity (e.g., dev/design needs).](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3836.0)
  - [**Flexibility:** GrowthX is open to a flexible partnership, viewing Superhuman as a key lighthouse customer.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jess & Mark:** Share content examples and programmatic SEO ideas with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=4093.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Schedule a follow-up meeting for **Wednesday, Nov 26, at 12:30 PM PT**.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=4009.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Prepare a scoped proposal for the follow-up meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/HzuD8ocSTjo4RKQNJzGNc4VH5N8HFJuc?tab=summary&timestamp=3969.0)

Send Jess/Mark follow-up invite for Nov 26 12:30; include Marcel
Send Jess/Mark invites to early-Dec breakfast
Send Tyler/Marcel content examples + programmatic ideas; then GrowthX prep scope/pricing
Send Tyler/Marcel content examples + programmatic ideas; then GrowthX prep scope/pricing
